recommendations.title: Next Gen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A friendship with a top-secret robot turns a lonely girl's life into a thrilling adventure as they take on bullies, evil bots and a scheming madman.

recommendations.title: Entergalactic
recommendations.overview: Ambitious artist Jabari attempts to balance success and love when he moves into his dream Manhattan apartment and falls for his next-door neighbor.

recommendations.title: Upside Down
recommendations.overview: In an alternate universe where twinned worlds have opposite gravities, a young man battles interplanetary prejudice and the laws of physics in his quest to reunite with the long-lost girl of his dreams in this visually stunning romantic adventure tha

recommendations.title: Alpha and Omega
recommendations.overview: Two young wolves at opposite ends of their pack's social order are thrown together into a foreign land and need each other to return home, but love complicates everything.

recommendations.title: I Lost My Body
recommendations.overview: A story of Naoufel, a young man who is in love with Gabrielle. In another part of town, a severed hand escapes from a dissection lab, determined to find its body again.

recommendations.title: Hello World
recommendations.overview: A shy high schooler in Kyoto meets a man claiming to be his future self, who tells him he’s hacked into the past to save their first love.

recommendations.title: America: The Motion Picture
recommendations.overview: A chainsaw-wielding George Washington teams with beer-loving bro Sam Adams to take down the Brits in a tongue-in-cheek riff on the American Revolution.

recommendations.title: Coffee and Cigarettes
recommendations.overview: An anthology of eleven vignettes featuring star-studded casts of extremely unique individuals who all share the common activities of conversing while drinking coffee and smoking cigarettes.

recommendations.title: Everything You Always Wanted to Know About Sex *But Were Afraid to Ask
recommendations.overview: A collection of seven vignettes, which each address a question concerning human sexuality. From aphrodisiacs to sexual perversion to the mystery of the male orgasm, characters like a court jester, a doctor, a queen and a journalist adventure through

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A single man has worked most of his life in a supermarket. One night, he unexpectedly meets with his father, and the two are faced with the question of the reasons for their separation.
